REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A VIABLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF INCLUDING STANDING TO CHALLENGE THE CC&R; STANDING TO BRING AN ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF 2 C.C.R. 12005 ET SEQ., AND AN ACTUAL CONTROVERSY. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS TO SUPPORT EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COURT DOES NOT REACH ANY OTHER ARGUMENTS RAISED IN THE DEMURRER AT THIS TIME. THESE ARGUMENTS MAY BE BROUGHT UP LATER IF NECESSARY AND PROPER. JUDGE: HAROLD L. KAHN ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a viable cause of action for declaratory relief including standing to challenge the CC&R; standing to bring an action for violation of 2 C.C.R. 12005 et seq., and an actual controversy. Plaintiff must allege facts, not conclusions to support each element of each cause of action. The Court does not reach any other arguments raised in the demurrer at this time. These arguments may be brought up later if necessary and proper.

Judge: Harold L. Kahn ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Poritions Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Strike Portions of First Amended Complaint is moot in light of the ruling on the demurrer.

Judge: Harold L. Kahn ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:
